...
At Delta Air Lines, we are continually looking to build a high performing, self-motivated team of technologists who embrace new technologies to enhance the customer and employee experience.

We are looking for an Innovation & AI Engineering Intern to design and develop machine learning and AI-based products that incorporate cutting-edge technology. Just a heads up, this isn't a typical engineeringrole.

As an Innovation & AI Engineering Intern at Delta, you will own projects from day 1. You will be responsible for:

Distinguished Engineer AI | Hirevector
...
# Distinguished Engineer AI
...
Posted Jun 22, 2026
...
At Delta Air Lines, connection is at the heart of everything we do and guides our every action. We strive to welcome and care for all our customers during their travels with us and aim to deliver an elevated experience. Delta is investing in and growing our capabilities across our IT global technology hubs, to continually improve the end-to-end travel experience for our customers and enable our 90,000 Delta people who serve them.
...
- We are seeking a Distinguished Engineer to serve as a senior technical authority and strategic leader in designing and scaling next-generation cloud and Agentic AI platforms. This role combines deep expertise in AWS cloud architecture and developing and democratizing building Agentic applications. The Distinguished Engineer will drive technical vision, influence architecture across teams, and lead the development of highly scalable, secure, and resilient systems that power mission-critical applications. This role requires a hands-on technical leader who thrives in solving complex distributed systems challenges and shaping long-term platform strategy. Responsibilities include, but are not limited to:
...
- Define and drive the technical vision and architecture for cloud-native and AI-enabled platforms across the organization
...
- Lead the design and implementation of large-scale distributed systems using AWS services and microservices
...
- Architect and optimize Agentic applications
...
- Define and evangelize Delta’s Agentic architecture and establish the taxonomy of Delta AI Agents
...
- Establish engineering best practices for scalability, reliability, performance, and security
...
- Collaborate with product, data science, and infrastructure teams to align technical strategy with business goals
...
- Evaluate emerging technologies and incorporate innovative solutions into the platform roadmap
...
- Lead architectural reviews and guide complex technical decision-making
...
- Champion DevOps and automation practices, including CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure as code, even for building agentic applications
...
- WHAT YOU NEED TO SUCCEED (MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS)
...
- 15+ years of software engineering experience with a strong focus on large-scale distributed systems
- Hands-on experience with AI driven development tools
- Hands-on experience designing and developing Agentic applications
...
- Deep expertise in AWS cloud architecture (e.g., EC2, Lambda, ECS/EKS, S3, RDS/DynamoDB, API Gateway)
...
- Advanced proficiency modern backend frameworks (e.g., Spring Boot, Quarkus)
...
- Strong experience designing and deploying AI/ML solutions in production environments
...
- Proven track record of leading architecture for high-availability, cloud-native systems
...
- Experience with microservices architecture, containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and event-driven systems
...
- Strong understanding of data architecture, APIs, and system integration patterns
...
- WHAT WILL GIVE YOU A COMPETITIVE EDGE (PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS)
...
- Bachelors Degree in Computer Science, Information Systems or related technical field is preferred
- Experience working in an airline technology environment is preferred
- Experience with large-scale AI platforms or generative AI systems
- Knowledge of additional programming languages such as Python or Scala
- AWS certifications or equivalent cloud credentials
...
- Experience in highly regulated or enterprise environments
...
- Demonstrated success driving
...
ational technical initiatives

I design and deploy real-world Generative AI systems — not just models, but production-ready AI solutions that solve business problems. With 5+ years of experience in Python, Machine Learning, and Generative AI, I specialize in building LLM-powered systems using Vertex AI, Azure OpenAI, LangChain, and vector databases like FAISS and Pinecone. At Delta Airlines, I worked on enterprise AI solutions that analyze operational logs, extract insights from unstructured data, and automate decision-making using LLM pipelines. What I bring to a team: • End-to-end AI system development (data → model → deployment → monitoring) • Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and LLM integration • Production AI pipelines using FastAPI, MLflow, Docker, and Kubernetes • Strong experience with real enterprise data (logs, documents, contracts, analytics datasets) • Ability to translate business problems into scalable AI solutions I enjoy working on projects where AI improves productivity, automation, and decision-making — especially in enterprise environments. highlights:
AI Software Engineer – Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning Solutions Developer | Hirevector
...
# AI Software Engineer – Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning Solutions Developer
...
### The Role: AI Software Engineer
...
Are you ready to join a team that's reshaping the future of aviation through artificial intelligence? We are currently seeking a talented and motivated AI Software Engineer to become an integral part of our Innovation team. In this role, you'll have the unique opportunity to work on initiatives that span the entire enterprise, solving real-world, large-scale problems using state-of-the-art AI technologies.
...
This is more than just a coding position—it's a chance to be at the forefront of technological innovation in the travel industry. You'll collaborate with experts across disciplines, partner with specialized business units, and help democratize AI throughout our organization. Your work will directly impact how millions of travelers experience air travel, making their journeys smoother, more efficient, and more enjoyable.
...
As an AI Software Engineer at arenaflex, you will play a pivotal role in identifying, defining, and solving business challenges through artificial intelligence. Your responsibilities will include:
...
Work collaboratively with cross-functional teams and partner departments to identify and define business problems that are suitable for AI-driven solutions. You'll serve as the bridge between technical capabilities and business needs.
...
Actively participate in developing the strategy surrounding which frameworks, technologies, and infrastructure our team should utilize for our proof-of-concepts and pilots for AI solutions. You'll help shape the technical direction of our innovation efforts.
...
Build verification of concepts and prototypes that can be used to demonstrate the impact of artificial intelligence across Delta's various specialty units. You'll transform theoretical ideas into tangible demonstrations.
...
Construct a suite of reusable models and solutions that enable rapid prototyping and accelerate the deployment of AI capabilities throughout the organization.
...
Foster an AI-first mindset and help democratize artificial intelligence for arenaflex, ensuring that teams across the organization can leverage these powerful technologies to improve their work.
...
- 3-4 years of work or educational experience in AI and Artificial Intelligence

- Experience with at least one general-purpose programming language including Java, C/C++, Python, or R

- Strong experience with Python for programming development and knowledge of complex methodologies and nuances of programming development in Python

- Experience with at least one of the following: Natural Language Processing, sentiment analysis, classification, or pattern recognition
...
- Development experience with AI frameworks such as TensorFlow, Microsoft CNTK, scikit-learn, Keras, Caffe, Gluon, LightGBM, SageMaker, or Azure AI
...
- Side projects you've worked on in the past couple of years in the AI/ML space

- Relevant experience in the travel, aviation, or airline industry

- Advanced degrees in Computer Science, Data Science, or related fields

- Experience with cloud platforms and distributed computing

- Knowledge of aircraft operations and logistics
...
you're

career and join

At arenaflex, we're looking for individuals who are excited about pushing the boundaries of what's possible in the aviation industry. If you're passionate about artificial intelligence, love solving complex problems, and want to make a real impact on how people travel, we want to hear from you.

👋🏽 Hi LinkedIn community! 🎓 I have a background in Data Science from University of Rochester. I am passionate about building Machine Learning models that solve problems. 💻 Currently I'm working as a Data Scientist with the Engineering Analytics team at Delta Air Lines. I worked as a Data Science Intern at Point32Health focused on implementation of machine learning models to classify place of service codes and validate based on insurance claims, I have also worked on vector databases to manage text data using NLP approaches. Previously, I was a Machine Learning Intern at Continental Automotive Components India where I was responsible for training a traffic sign classifier for Advanced Driver Assistance Systems.I also worked closely with Samsung R&D Institute on Emotion Recognition Classifier worklet during my undergrad. I enjoy supporting organisations in leveraging data science and its versatile tools to solve issues across diverse verticals. highlights:
Senior Engineer AI @ Delta Airlines | Ex-Carelon global solutions | IIT madras
...
Senior engineer AI at [Delta Technology Hub](https://www.linkedin.com/showcase/delta-technology-hub)
...
Hello! I am an IT professional with 4.5 years of experience specializing in Software Engineering, particularly in the realms of data science, Artificial Intelligence, and Machine Learning, with a strong focus on the Healthcare Sector. Currently, I serve as a Software Engineer III at Carelon Global Solutions India, where I develop sophisticated AI-driven solutions that enhance operational efficiency and support informed decision-making. My journey has equipped me with a diverse skill set in generative AI, Natural Language Processing, Deep Learning, and Machine Learning, allowing me to tackle complex challenges with innovative problem-solving approaches. AI Product Owner at [Delta Air Lines](https://www.linkedin.com/company/delta-air-lines)
...
I turn complex business problems into measurable outcomes — through structured analysis, AI product ownership, and relentless focus on delivery. With 6+ years across aviation, healthcare, banking, and e-commerce, I've worked at the intersection of business strategy and technology — owning AI/ML product roadmaps, driving enterprise modernisation, and translating ambiguous requirements into features that actually ship. At Delta Air Lines, I own the AI product roadmap for a Reserve Pilot Demand Prediction platform — defining ML success criteria, running A/B experimentation, and coordinating cross-functional squads across product, data science, and engineering. The result: next-day reserve coverage up from 41% to 67%. At Aetna, I led business analysis for a claims modernisation programme handling 3.2M+ monthly claims — uncovering $4.2M in billing discrepancies, cutting the claims rejection rate from 22% to 9% in 60 days, and reducing processing cycle time by 38%. Earlier at Bank of America and Amazon, I built the data validation frameworks, SQL pipelines, and reporting infrastructure that teams actually relied on — not just delivered documentation. What I bring to every engagement: — AI product thinking grounded in real delivery (PRDs, backlogs, model lifecycle, A/B testing) — Business analysis depth across regulated industries (healthcare, finance, aviation) — The ability to align engineering, data science, compliance, and operations around a shared outcome Certified Scrum Product Owner | MS Computer Science, University of North Texas Open to Business Analyst and Product Owner roles where AI, data, and operational complexity intersect.

results.title: Data Scientist | Hirevector
highlights:
Data Scientist | Hirevector
...
# Data Scientist
...
- Data Scientist
- Req number:
- R7744
- Employment type:
- Full time
- Worksite flexibility:
- Remote
...
- We are looking for a motivated Data Scientist ready to take us to the next level! If you have designing, developing, and deploying state-of-the-art agentic systems, automation solutions, and generative AI applications to enable autonomous decision-making and optimize business processes and are looking for your next career move, apply now
...
Description
- We are looking for a Data Scientist - Agentic Developer to design cutting-edge AI solutions and autonomous systems focused on agentic workflows and generative AI technologies. This position will be full-time and remote.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy multi-agent systems and agentic applications using frameworks like AutoGen, LangGraph, CrewAI, or similar
...
Use ML, deep learning, and Generative AI tools to design, evangelize, and implement state-of-the-art solutions
...
Define and implement best practices for building, testing, and deploying scalable AI solutions, with a focus on generative models and LLMs using proprietary or open-source models
...
Drive successful business outcomes by designing and building cloud-hosted Generative AI solutions
...
Work with public cloud (AWS) and on-premises infrastructure for deploying LLMs, agents, and orchestration systems
...
Evaluate, build, and fine-tune ML models and LLMs to solve complex business problems
...
Stay abreast of latest developments in agentic AI, autonomous systems, language models, and generative AI technologies.
...
- What You'll Need
- Required:
- BE, Master's or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, or equivalent practical experience
...
4-8 years of overall technical experience with 0-2 years of hands-on experience in Generative AI and LLM technologies
...
1+ years of experience building agentic systems, workflow automation, or autonomous AI applications
...
Deep hands-on experience with agentic frameworks (AutoGen, LangGraph, CrewAI, Agency Swarm, or similar)
...
Expertise in OpenAPI standards, Agent-to-Agent (A2A) protocols, and Model Context Protocol (MCP)
...
Proven track record of deploying and optimizing LLM models for inference in production environments
...
Extensive experience with LLM orchestration frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex required)
...
Hands-on experience with Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker JumpStart, and other cloud-based LLM platforms
...
Expertise in RAG architectures, Fine-tuning techniques, and Prompt Engineering
...
Expert in NLP techniques and deep learning libraries (Transformer models, LSTM, BiLSTM, CNN, BERT, GPT, T5)
...
Proficiency with ML frameworks: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face Transformers, scikit-learn
...
Hands-on experience in MLOps/LLMOps including data pipelines, model training/refinement, validation, drift management, and serving
...
Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and CI/CD pipelines for ML systems
...
Knowledge of monitoring, logging, and observability tools for production AI systems
...
Knowledge of reinforcement learning and agent training methodologies
...
Contributions to open-source AI/ML projects
...
Publications or patents in AI/ML domain

results.title: Applied Data Scientist | Hirevector
highlights:
Applied Data Scientist | Hirevector
...
# Applied Data Scientist
...
Your Role at Delta Faucet
...
Are you passionate about using data science, artificial intelligence, and advanced analytics to propel decisions? If you are interested in driving meaningful change for a growth focused consumer products brand, this is an opportunity to join the market-leading Delta Faucet Company team as we use analytics to turbocharge strategic insights!
...
Reporting to the Manager of Data Science and Analytics, this role will work with analytics and domain specialists across the business to deliver high-impact insights and data science solutions. You will develop advanced analytical models, experimentation tests, applied AI techniques, and partner with business stakeholders to translate complex data into clear, actionable recommendations that support the company’s growth initiatives.
...
As an Applied Data Scientist within Delta Faucet Company’s Analytics Center of Excellence (ACoE), you will act as an owner of high impact analysis and data science initiatives that support complex, ambiguous business decisions. This role focuses on advanced analytics, experimentation, and applied AI.
...
- Independently lead end-to-end analytics and data science projects, from problem framing through delivery of actionable insights.
- Apply statistical methods, machine learning, and analytical modeling to solve business problems related to growth, customer behavior, market dynamics, and operational efficiency.
- Develop and maintain analytical data models and curated datasets, partnering with data engineering and BI teams.
- Build AI and machine learning solutions that are aligned with business needs.
- Collaborate closely with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into clear recommendations.
- Present data-driven recommendations to leaders across the organization, including tactical and C-suite.
...
- 4+ years of experience in data science, advanced analytics, or applied machine learning roles.
- 4+ years of hands-on experience applying statistical methods and analytical modeling to real business problems.
- 4+ years of experience using Python for data analysis, modeling, and experimentation.
- 4+ years of experience writing and refining complex SQL queries against large, structured datasets.
- 3+ years of experience partnering directly with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into actionable recommendations.
- 2+ years of experience working in a modern analytics platform (e.g., Databricks, Spark/PySpark, or similar).
- 1+ years of hands-on‑ experience applying generative AI technologies (e.g., LLM APIs, task‑specific GenAI workflows) in an enterprise analytics environment.
...
- Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, Economics, or a
...
quantitative field.
...
- 2+ years of experience with analytics engineering and data modeling, including building reusable, well-documented analytical datasets; familiarity with medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold) preferred.
- 1+ years of experience with model monitoring, experiment tracking, and model evaluation in production settings.
- 1+ years of experience with conjoint analysis or other stated-preference research methods.
...
Company: Delta Faucet Company
...
Hiring Range: $88,700.00 - $139,260.00 USD

highlights: to join the market-leading Delta Faucet Company team as we use analytics to turbocharge strategic insights! Reporting to the Manager of Data Science and Analytics, this role will work with analytics and domain specialists across the business to deliver high-impact insights and data science solutions. You will develop advanced analytical models, experimentation tests, applied AI techniques, and partner with business stakeholders to translate complex data into clear, actionable recommendations that support the company’s growth initiatives. Responsibilities As an Applied Data Scientist within Delta Faucet Company’s Analytics Center of Excellence (ACoE), you will act as an owner of high impact analysis and data science initiatives that support complex, ambiguous business decisions. This role focuses on advanced analytics, experimentation, and applied AI. Independently lead end-to-end analytics and data science projects, from problem framing through delivery of actionable insights. Apply statistical methods, machine learning, and analytical modeling to solve business problems related to growth, customer behavior, market dynamics, and operational efficiency. Develop and maintain analytical data models and curated datasets, partnering with data engineering and BI teams. Build AI and machine learning solutions that are aligned with business needs. Collaborate closely with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into clear recommendations. Present data-driven recommendations to leaders across the organization, including tactical and C-suite. Qualifications 4+ years of experience in data science, advanced analytics, or applied machine learning roles. 4+ years of hands-on experience applying statistical methods and analytical modeling to real business problems. 4+ years of experience using Python for data analysis, modeling, and experimentation. 4+ years of experience writing and refining complex SQL queries against large, structured datasets. 3+ years of experience partnering directly with business stakeholders to translate analytical findings into actionable recommendations. 2+ years of experience working in a modern analytics platform (e.g., Databricks, Spark/PySpark, or similar). 1+ years of hands-on‑ experience applying generative AI technologies (e.g., LLM APIs, task‑specific GenAI workflows) in an enterprise analytics environment. Bachelor’s degree in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Data Science, Economics, or a related quantitative field. Preferred Qualifications 2+ years of experience with analytics engineering and data modeling, including building reusable, well-documented analytical datasets; familiarity with medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold) preferred. 1+ years of experience with model monitoring, experiment tracking, and model evaluation in production settings. 1+ years of experience with conjoint analysis or other stated-preference research methods. Why Join Us? At Delta Faucet Company, our people are our greatest assets. We value different perspectives and fostering an inclusive environment. You’ll have the opportunity to shape the future of our brand, working alongside passionate professionals committed to excellence and innovation. Join us to lead progressive growth and make a significant impact within a leading organization. Here are some of the benefits we offer for your personal and professional growth: Culture: Recognized and award-winning reputation for equality, diversity and inclusion, flexibility, work-life balance, and more. Wellbeing: Comprehensive benefit plans; retirement, savings, tuition reimbursement, and employee incentive programs; resources for mental, physical, and financial wellbeing. Learning & Development: LinkedIn Learning access; internal opportunities to work on projects cross-company. Social Impact: Four employee-led and self-directed Business Resource Groups; Paid volunteer day annually; Employees share their time, skills and talent with

...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...
- Work with large scale structured and unstructured data; explore, experiment, build and continuously improve foundation models for Airbnb product, business and operational use cases.
...
- Create a multi-year tech roadmap that enables our team to stay on the leading edge of the rapidly evolving AI landscape and leverage the best in class technologies to deliver customer benefits.
...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...
- Minimum Qualifications:
...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...
- Proven record of training, fine tuning, optimizing models and inference run-time
...
- Post-training experience in areas like data processing for fine-tuning; responsible LLMs; LLM alignment; reinforcement learning; efficient training and inference; language model evaluation; and/or multilingual and multimodal modeling.
...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...
- Preferred Qualifications:
...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.

- Publications at peer-reviewed AI conferences (e.g., NeurIPS, CVPR, ICML, ICLR, ICCV, and ACL).
- Customer Support Systems: Experience with AI technologies in customer support applications.
- Agile Practice for AI production: Experience with the entire AI product development lifecycle from incubation to production at scale, following agile practices in the Applied AI/ML domain.
...
- Infrastructure Acumen: Experience deploying and scaling business-critical AI services and driving architectural requirements on ML infrastructures
